approaches.title: Flatten the grid and rotate the linear sequence
approaches.summary: Flattens the 2D grid into a one-dimensional vector, rotates it right by k positions, then rebuilds the rows.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial solution using a flattened buffer and Vec::rotate_right.

approaches.title: In-place three-reversal rotation
approaches.summary: Treats the grid as a linear sequence while accessing elements by row and column, and performs an in-place right rotation using three reversals without creating-

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces the allocated flattened buffer with in-place triple-reversal rotation.
